/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server/server_app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server/network_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server/order_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server/product_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server/products_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server/orders_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server/table_numbers_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server/handlers/order_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/server/handlers/product_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server_app.dir/shared/json_utils.cpp.o -o server_app
